original_question: Sasha notices that prices for lumber have gone up 50% in the last few months after she bought some lumber. Since she has leftovers, she decides to sell them. She has leftover ten 2 x 4 x 10 boards that cost her $10 each. She also has five 4 x 4 x 10 boards she bought for $16 each. If she sells them all, how much profit does she make? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".

similar_questions.question: Jordan notices that prices for drywall have gone up 40% in the last few months after he purchased some. Since he has leftovers, he decides to sell them. He has leftover fifteen 2 x 4 x 8 panels that cost him $8 each. He also has six 4 x 4 x 8 panels he bought for $12 each. If he sells them all, how much profit does he make?

Alex realizes that prices for bricks have increased by 60% in the last few months following his purchase. Since he has surplus, he decides to sell them. He has leftover twenty 3 x 4 x 12 bricks that cost him $5 each. He also has eight 6 x 6 x 12 bricks he bought for $20 each. If he sells them all, how much profit does he make?

Kim observes that prices for concrete have surged by 30% in the past few months after she bought some. Since she has extra, she decides to sell them. She has leftover twelve 2 x 6 x 12 blocks that cost her $15 each. She also has seven 4 x 6 x 12 blocks she bought for $25 each. If she sells them all, how much profit does she make?

Morgan sees that prices for tiles have risen by 45% recently after he made his purchase. With some excess on hand, he decides to sell them. He has leftover eighteen 1 x 1 x 1 tiles that cost him $3 each. He also has four 2 x 2 x 1 tiles he bought for $18 each. If he sells them all, how much profit does he make?

Jamie finds that prices for insulation have gone up 55% in recent months since his purchase. With some remaining, he plans to sell them. He has leftover twenty-five 3 x 3 x 10 rolls that cost him $6 each. He also has three 5 x 5 x 10 rolls he bought for $30 each. If he sells them all, how much profit does he make?
